summary: SEO implementation testing for Yrvante website. All 12 SEO requirements PASSED after fixing 404 page title bug. Fixed missing /404 entry in seoData causing fallback to homepage title.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: sitemap.xml accessible with 34 URLs (>30 required)
2. PASS: sitemap.xml contains all /voor/* niche pages (kappers, loodgieters, coaches, restaurants, zzp, fotografen, tandartsen)
3. PASS: robots.txt accessible and references sitemap.xml
5. PASS: Pakketten page meta description mentions all 4 packages: Rebranding (€349), Basis (€500), Pro (€900), Premium (€1400)
6. PASS: Calculator page meta description mentions Rebranding and 4 packages
7. PASS: 404 page has noindex meta robots tag
8. PASS: 404 page title is '404 - Pagina Niet Gevonden | Yrvante' (not homepage title) - FIXED
9. PASS: Canonical URL updates per page (pakketten has canonical to yrvante.com/pakketten)
10. PASS: Schema.org structured data includes Rebranding Pakket €349 and all 4 packages
11. PASS: All main pages have SEO component (/, /pakketten, /calculator, /over-mij, /diensten, /privacy, /blog, /onderhoud, /waarom-website)
12. PASS: Cookie banner works (appears, accepts, persists to localStorage)
13. PASS: React.lazy loading works (calculator page loads correctly)
critical_code_review_comments: SEO.jsx: Added missing /404 entry to seoData for both nl and en languages
sitemap.xml: Contains 34 URLs including all niche pages - well structured with hreflang alternates
robots.txt: Properly configured with sitemap reference and crawl-delay
index.html: Schema.org structured data correctly includes all 4 packages with Rebranding €349
Font loading optimized: Only Playfair Display and DM Sans loaded (Inter removed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22: SEO implementation fully tested. Fixed bug where 404 page was using homepage title due to missing /404 entry in seoData. Added /404 SEO data for both nl and en languages. All SEO features working: sitemap.xml (34 URLs), robots.txt, meta tags, canonical URLs, noindex on 404, schema.org with Rebranding package. Cookie banner and lazy loading still working (regression tests passed).

bug_fixed.issue: 404 page showing homepage title instead of unique 404 title
bug_fixed.root_cause: SEO.jsx seoData object had no '/404' key, causing fallback to '/' (homepage) data
bug_fixed.fix: Added '/404' entry to seoData for both nl and en languages with proper 404 title and description
